# JiraIssueSensor

Polls Jira's search API with a JQL query (auto-augmented with `updated >= cursor`). Triggers a RunRequest per new/updated issue. Basic-authed via API token.

<!-- FIELDS:START - auto-generated by tools/regen_readme_fields.py -->

## Fields

### Required

| Field | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `sensor_name` | `str` | Unique sensor name. |
| `asset_keys` | `List[str]` | Slash-separated asset keys to materialize when an event matches. |
| `base_url` | `str` | Jira base URL (e.g. https://mycompany.atlassian.net). |
| `email` | `str` | Atlassian email. |
| `jql` | `str` | Base JQL query (e.g. 'project = OPS AND status != Done'). |

### Connection

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `api_token_env_var` | `str` | `"JIRA_API_TOKEN"` | Env var with the Atlassian API token. |

### Sensor configuration

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `minimum_interval_seconds` | `int` | `60` | Minimum seconds between sensor evaluations. |
| `default_status` | `str` | `"STOPPED"` | 'RUNNING' or 'STOPPED'. |

### Other

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `fields` | `List[str]` | `['summary', 'status', 'priority', 'assignee']` | Fields to fetch per issue. |

<!-- FIELDS:END -->

## Example YAML
```yaml
type: dagster_component_templates.JiraIssueSensorComponent
attributes:
  sensor_name: ops_critical_jira_sensor
  asset_keys: [incident_report]
  base_url: "https://mycompany.atlassian.net"
  email: ops@mycompany.com
  api_token_env_var: JIRA_API_TOKEN
  jql: "project = OPS AND priority = Highest"
  minimum_interval_seconds: 300
```

## Requirements

```
requests
```
